channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Stop burning money on mobile backends
item.description: Cut mobile backend latency 85% with Redis 7.2 caching, pgbouncer 1.23 pooling, and Node 20 keep-alive tuning — the 3 metrics to watch when cellular radio drops

item.title: Leverage local costs for global remote pay
item.description: Negotiate remote pay like a pro with Notion template — living-cost model, salary bands, margin calculator, and negotiation scripts for 2026. Save $25k+ per year.

item.title: Remote portfolio hacks for African devs
item.description: Cut job search time 50% with one portfolio shift — swap demos for deliverables that reduce cost, latency, or on-call load. Build a Terraform module, CLI, or GitHub Action that shows measurable impact and wins remote interviews in Africa.

item.title: AI skills that move the salary needle in 2026
item.description: AI skills that move the needle in 2026: 22–35% salary premium for vector search + RAG vs 18–28% for observability and cost control — concrete benchmarks, cost breakdowns, and the concrete next step to start today.

item.title: Python packaging in 2026: the right stack
item.description: Cut CI time 90% by dropping setup.py in 2026 — Hatch 1.25.0, PEP 665 locks, and the editable install trap most teams miss

item.title: Choose WebSockets vs SSE vs Polling in 2024
item.description: Compare WebSocket vs Server-Sent Events vs long-polling with Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2 — latency benchmarks, cost data, and the exact mistake that cost $480/month.

item.title: Vector DBs vs full-text: when AI search needs neither
item.description: Cut search latency 60% and infra cost 40% by skipping vector databases. Benchmarks for Qdrant 1.10 vs Redis 7.2 vs PostgreSQL 16 pg_embedding show when hybrid indexes beat vectors.

item.title: 2026 AI skills that pay (and 3 that don’t)
item.description: In 2026, vector search skills pay 25–45% more than prompt engineering. See benchmarks from Milvus 2.4 and LangChain 0.2, plus salary data from 87,000 job postings.

item.title: Mobile-first backends break these 5 things first
item.description: Our error rate on 4G jumped from 1.2% to 8.7% within two weeks.

item.title: Chroma breaks in prod: 3 gotchas
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 35× with Milvus 2.3.6-lite — the real scalability limits of Chroma, FAISS, and prompt bloat exposed with real numbers and Terraform snippets.

item.title: Beat remote pay offers: 4 levers not on the table
item.description: Increase remote salary 50–100% with 4 levers most developers miss — benchmarks, value ties, currency hedges, and contract clauses. 2026 data from Levels.fyi, Wise, and LatAm job boards.

item.title: Costly simplicity: why less tech wins
item.description: Cut AWS costs 75% and latency 82% by removing Redis, microservices, and event buses — real numbers from a 2026 case study on over-engineering.

item.title: African devs: your portfolio sucks (and how to fix it)
item.description: African devs waste months building GitHub profiles that get ignored. A 500-word post-mortem, a Locust 2.20 report, or a runbook beats 10k stars in 2026 — real production artifacts get you hired remotely.

item.title: Stop guessing pool size—here's the math
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with PostgreSQL connection pooling — why the max pool size of 10 fails in 2026, how to calculate the right size, and the pgBouncer trick most teams miss.

item.title: Non-coders launch products with AI stacks
item.description: Cost under load: I benchmarked each stack at 1,000 concurrent users using k6.

item.title: Multi-agent systems: the prod reality
item.description: Cut agent framework costs 42% with Redis caching and back-pressure — tools, failure modes, and the exact latency and cost numbers from a live 2026 system.

item.title: Shrink cloud carbon 25% — fast
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 28% without hurting speed — ARM migration, Redis 7.2 caching, and PostgreSQL 15 tuning for real-time apps serving 250k users in Latin America.

item.title: Why senior devs flee big tech
item.description: Senior engineers quit big tech not for money — for ownership. Measure cycle time, automate compliance, deploy to prod first. 2026 data and tools inside.

item.title: Over-engineered until it broke
item.description: Cut p99 latency 83% and AWS bill 72% by replacing Kafka Streams + RocksDB with PostgreSQL + Redis. The real cost of over-engineering in 2026.

item.title: Convert global salary to local take-home
item.description: Why I wrote this (the problem I kept hitting) I spent two weeks arguing with a US-based startup about a salary that looked generous on paper but left me…
